content.text: The cryptocurrency market includes various assets with different price points. Wrapped Bitcoin (WBTC) is currently valued at $80,488.74, while Wrapped Ethereum (WETH) is priced at $2,018.31. Solana (SOL) is trading at $126.42, and ai16z is valued at $0.1925.
A fix was implemented to resolve a missing moment rollup external issue in the-org build.
Core types were added to enable the generation of index.d.ts in the /dist directory, addressing errors related to missing types in imports.

A user reported being unable to get past the pnpm install and build process due to an issue with switching pnpm to version 9.15.7. Despite forcing the version switch, build commands failed due to missing pnpm CLI files.

categories.title: Issues and Fixes in ElizaOS Plugins

content.text: A user reported an issue with the '@elizaos-plugins/client-twitter' plugin, which fails to process Twitter actions despite all other plugins working correctly. The issue persists regardless of whether 'ragKnowledge' is enabled or disabled. Logs indicate potential problems with embedding inputs and invalid message structures. Additionally, there is a missing package error for '@elizaos-plugins/client-telegram'.

A fix was introduced for the '@elizaos-plugins/client-telegram' plugin, adding a 'serviceType' property to support multi-platform functionality for Ruby. This minor change allows for cross-platform testing.
A fix was implemented to address a missing moment rollup external dependency in the ElizaOS build.
Core types were added to enable the generation of index.d.ts in the /dist directory, resolving missing type errors in imports.
A user reported being unable to complete the pnpm install and build process due to an issue with switching to pnpm v9.15.7. The error persisted despite manually forcing the version switch.

A tutorial on building a Social AI Agent in 15 minutes was found to be outdated. The embedded video and textual instructions no longer align with the current implementation. Additionally, inconsistencies in the documentation regarding Twitter as a client or plugin were noted.
A user encountered an 'Error processing tweet undefined' issue while using the Twitter plugin. Despite ensuring the fork was up to date, Twitter actions failed to process.
A fix was introduced for NEAR AI image generation, ensuring the correct API invocation and preventing fallback to OpenAI.
A minor fix was made to the Telegram plugin, adding a serviceType to support multi-platform functionality for Ruby.
Six contributors merged two pull requests, focusing on various improvements.
